investigation_summary: France ~€1.25B tax settlement (2021–2022 press). Luxembourg royalty funnel drew EU scrutiny (no state aid finding but near-zero royalty tax story). Black franchisee steering $1B class (2021). EEOC $1.5M sexual harassment corporate-store settlement (2021). Franchise joint-employer NLRB/DOJ tension. Fight for $15 anchor.

profile.tax_summary: Luxembourg royalty routing reduced European tax on royalties (EU investigation closed without aid finding). Illinois EDGE credits ~$20M for Chicago HQ move. >$233M U.S. subsidies (Good Jobs First tracker).
profile.legal_summary: French tax fraud settlement widely reported ~€1.25B. Franchise wage-theft class settlements; joint-employer doctrine fights. EEOC harassment case. Racial steering litigation with large headline settlement value.
profile.labor_summary: Fight for $15 icon. SEIU-tracked franchise wage theft settlements ~$5.5M aggregate (2018–2021). Starting pay ~$13–15 — below living wage in major cities. No living-wage certification.
profile.environmental_summary: Beef GHG footprint large; 2030 supply-chain emissions target disputed by NGOs. Plastic Happy Meal toys partially reduced (UK pressure). CDP B.
profile.political_summary: ~$2.1M lobbying (2023) — joint-employer, wage law. Industry front-group nutrition politics historically.
profile.product_health: Ultra-processed menu (NOVA). Sodium and sugar exceed single-meal WHO guidance in combo meals. 2024 Quarter Pounder onion E. coli outbreak (supplier Taylor Farms) — public health trace-back.
profile.executive_summary: CEO rotation; franchisee relations politically sensitive.
